description: Implement plugin system for custom detectors and framework extensions. Build on existing framework-registry.ts pattern to enable third-party extensions, custom pattern definitions, and domain-specific analysis without modifying core code.
goal: Enable ecosystem maturity via plugin architecture - users can install or create custom detectors for frameworks, security rules, compliance checks, and graph relationships without core code changes
requirements: Plugin loader that discovers and loads detectors from node_modules/@coderef/* and local .coderef/plugins/
Plugin manifest format with name, version, detectors[], hooks[], dependencies
Detector API interface matching existing FrameworkDetector pattern
Extension points for: custom element types, graph relationship rules, analysis hooks
Configuration support in coderef.config.js for plugin registration

functional: Graph edges extended via plugin-defined relationships
Zero core code changes for new framework support
Example plugin published demonstrating Django detection
